generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder providing angular position of the robot first vertical axis motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox providing angular position of the gearbox output"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderStream
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring input current I_M of the first vertical axis motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (data transmitted)
instance MotorEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data instances
instance MotorAngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor angular position derived from MotorEncoderStream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, SimulinkTool
]

instance GearboxAngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox angular position derived from GearboxEncoderStream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, SimulinkTool
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor current I_M derived from MotorCurrentStream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, SimulinkTool
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated motor torque from current, motor model and gearbox ratios"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool, Sinumerik840DController
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity computed from motor and gearbox position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngularPositionData, GearboxAngularPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration derived from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLStructureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block diagram describing physical structure of the MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SysMLBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML internal block diagram describing behavior and flows of motor, gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of motor, gearwheel and gearbox including friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction model used for static, kinetic and viscous friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black‑box friction model used for data‑driven friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance DataCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model that calculates derived torque, velocity and acceleration from raw sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used for structural and behavioral engineering modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelIntegrationService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing simulation and friction identification models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService, ControlParameterUpdateService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker streaming live sensor data (current, positions) to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AAS component integrating SysML models with the digital twin architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelIntegrationService
]

instance Sinumerik840DController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller receiving updated friction parameters for motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterUpdateService
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard visualizing friction parameters and robot motion in real time"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard for friction parameters and robot motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizeFrictionParametersAction, FrictionBehaviorInsight
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction using white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionBehaviorInsight, MaintenanceDecisionInsight
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation and transmission of updated friction parameters to improve robot motion control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance ModelIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML engineering models with the digital twin via Asset Administration Shell"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelSyncInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Engineers gain insight into friction behavior for maintenance decisions"
]

instance MaintenanceDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Supports maintenance decision making based on identified friction trends"
]

instance ModelSyncInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensures digital twin models stay synchronized with the physical robot"
]

// C17: Actions
instance VisualizeFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualizes friction parameters in real time"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts SINUMERIK 840D control algorithms using identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow comprising: Purpose (FrictionDerivation), Asset (MABI robot first axis), Sources (sensor channels), Processing components (SimulationM, SimulationGW, SimulationGB) that consume input traces and produce simulated traces, and Models (engineering, simulation, data‑calculation) linked via the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operative (runtime) stage of the robot where friction is identified; the digital shadow also incorporates engineering models created during design."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point back to its source and processing model; comparison of simulated friction‑free and friction‑included models against measured traces; continuous re‑identification to capture wear‑induced changes, ensuring model validity for control accuracy improvements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Live sensor data are transmitted from the physical robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol over the plant network."
]
